title: rbac — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences. RBAC exposes a narrow settings surface — most configuration is framework-level (config/rbac.php) or entitlement-gated. Tenant admins can toggle notification cadence + adjust the reminder-before-expiry window within the framework floor.

groups.label: Access control
groups.description: Role + permission notification preferences + assignment lifecycle defaults.

fields.name: notify_on_role_assigned
fields.label: Notify members when roles are assigned
fields.helpText: Off = only silent seed-time assignments; owner/admin-initiated assignments still notify.

fields.name: notify_on_role_revoked
fields.label: Notify members when roles are revoked
fields.helpText: Cannot be disabled for revocations triggered by system-security events (breach response, principal_disabled).

fields.name: assignment_expiring_reminder_days
fields.label: Days before expiry to send reminder
fields.helpText: Framework floor: 1 day. Framework ceiling: 30 days.

fields.name: require_reason_on_assign
fields.label: Require a reason on role assignments
fields.helpText: When on, admins must include a `reason` field on every assignment. Audit-friendly for regulated tenants.

fields.name: require_reason_on_revoke
fields.label: Require a reason on role revocations
fields.helpText: Default on — revocations are more consequential than assignments.

fields.name: default_time_bounded_duration_days
fields.label: Default expiration window (days)
fields.helpText: Applied when an admin ticks 'time-bounded' without specifying a specific date. Requires time_bounded_role_assignments entitlement.

fields.name: custom_role_naming_convention
fields.label: Naming convention
fields.helpText: Applied by the tenant's custom-role naming validator. Framework floor is snake_case; this is a display preference.

fields.name: custom_role_default_permission_set
fields.label: Default permissions on new custom roles
fields.helpText: When creating a custom role, pre-select these permissions. Speeds up common configurations.
